title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ABB India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ABB India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? ABB India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
